---
# AUTOGENERATED. DO NOT EDIT.
title: "ServiceIdentity"
---
<code>ServiceIdentity</code> generates service identity for <a href="https://docs.cloud.google.com/iam/docs/service-agents">supported Google Cloud services</a>.
You can find the emails of the Google-managed service accounts in the status of a <code>ServiceIdentity</code> resource.

<thead>
<tr>
<th><strong>Property</strong></th>
<th><strong>Value</strong></th>
</tr>

<td>Service Usage</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Google Cloud Service Documentation</td>
<td><a href="https://docs.cloud.google.com/service-usage/docs/">https://docs.cloud.google.com/service-usage/docs/</a></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Google Cloud REST Resource Name</td>
<td>v1beta1.services.generateServiceIdentity</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Google Cloud Rest Resource Documentation</td>
<td><a href="https://docs.cloud.google.com/service-usage/docs/reference/rest/v1beta1/services/generateServiceIdentity">https://docs.cloud.google.com/service-usage/docs/reference/rest/v1beta1/services/generateServiceIdentity</a></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Config Connector Resource Short Names</td>
<td>gcpserviceidentities<br>gcpserviceidentity<br>serviceidentity</td>
</tr>
<tr>

<td>serviceusage.googleapis.com</td>
</tr>
<tr>

</tr>

<tr>

    <td>No</td>
</tr>

<td>0</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

### Status
#### Schema
```yaml
conditions:
- lastTransitionTime: string
  message: string
  reason: string
  status: string
  type: string
email: string
observedGeneration: integer
```

        </td>
    </tr>

        </td>
    </tr>

        <td><code>email</code></td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>The email address of the service account that a service producer would use to access consumer resources.</p>

        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">integer</code></p>
            <p>ObservedGeneration is the generation of the resource that was most recently observed by the Config Connector controller. If this is equal to metadata.generation, then that means that the current reported status reflects the most recent desired state of the resource.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## Sample YAML(s)

### Typical Use Case
```yaml
apiVersion: serviceusage.cnrm.cloud.google.com/v1beta1
kind: ServiceIdentity
metadata:
  name: serviceidentity-sample
spec:
  # Replace ${PROJECT_ID?} below with your project ID
  projectRef:
    external: ${PROJECT_ID?}
  resourceID: pubsub.googleapis.com
```

Note: If you have any trouble with instantiating the resource, refer to <a href="https://docs.cloud.google.com/config-connector/docs/troubleshooting">Troubleshoot Config Connector</a>.
